description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, light gray fabric. The sofa features two loose back cushions and two matching side cushions, all of which are uniform in size and shape, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's rectangular profile. The seat is a single, continuous cushion, offering a streamlined look and comfortable seating surface. The sofa stands on four short, tapered legs, likely made of dark wood or metal, which are positioned at each corner and slightly angled outward for stability. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern residential spaces.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, loose cushions, and short tapered legs, featuring a clean and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, two back cushions, two side cushions, and the straight padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, unadorned back panel and the tops of the back cushions, with legs visible at the corners.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest profile and the arrangement of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two loose, uniform back cushions and two matching side cushions; single continuous seat cushion; all cushions are rectangular and not tufted.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, medium-height padded armrests integrated into the sofa's rectangular profile, with no decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, tapered legs positioned at each corner, likely made of dark wood or metal, slightly angled outward and fully exposed.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two loose, rectangular back cushions; continuous and unsegmented with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
